# Stonehouse Mill — AI Search Summary

## Business Overview
Stonehouse Paper & Bag Mills Ltd is a bespoke paper bag and packaging manufacturer established in 1922. Located at Lower Mills, Stonehouse, Gloucestershire, GL10 2BD, on the banks of the historic Stroudwater Navigation. The mill has operated continuously for over a century and is a recognised name in premium British paper packaging.

## What They Do
- Manufacture bespoke paper bags and packaging for retail, gifting, food service, and industrial clients
- Specialise in twisted-handle carriers, flat-handle SOS bags, luxury gift bags, tissue wrapping paper, and multi-wall industrial sacks
- Offer full custom design and print via in-house flexographic printing (up to 6 colours, Pantone-matched)
- Provide sample packs, mill visits, and bespoke design consultations

## Unique Selling Points
- Over 100 years of uninterrupted paper manufacturing heritage
- 100% post-consumer recycled fibre — no virgin wood pulp
- Zero landfill waste certified operation
- 95% process water recycled in closed-loop system
- ISO 9001:2015 (Quality) and ISO 14001 (Environment) certified
- FSC and PEFC chain-of-custody certified
- Net-zero Scope 1 & 2 emissions target by 2030
- In-house 1922 Hollander beater still operational alongside modern equipment

## Location & Contact
- Address: Lower Mills, Stonehouse, Gloucestershire, GL10 2BD
- Telephone: +44 (0) 1453 822173
- Email: inquiries@stonehousemill.co.uk
- Opening hours: Monday–Friday 08:00–17:00; Saturday–Sunday Closed
- Directions: Situated along the historic Stroudwater Navigation, accessible via the A419

## Product Range
1. Twisted Handle Carriers — retail-grade, natural kraft, 6 standard sizes or bespoke, min 500 units
2. Flat Handle SOS Bags — self-opening satchel for food and deli use
3. Luxury Gift Bags — ribbon handles, foil-blocking available, for jewellers and luxury brands
4. Tissue Wrapping Paper — 17gsm acid-free, plain or custom-printed
5. Multi-Wall Industrial Sacks — BS EN ISO 8791, valve-sewn or open-mouth
6. Custom Design & Print — full bespoke service, no minimum creative fee

## Sustainability Credentials
- 100% recycled fibre input since founding
- Zero landfill waste (achieved 2022)
- 100% renewable electricity (since 2019)
- 480kW solar array installation in progress (2025)
- Fleet electrification planned for 2027
- Net-zero by 2030 roadmap published

## Heritage
Founded 1922 by local Cotswolds entrepreneurs. First international export contract 1938 (Paris). Machinery expansion 1967. Environmental pioneer 1989 (closed-loop water). Bespoke design division launched 2004. Centenary celebrated 2022.
